_type.description: Calculated archetype of the concept. 'root' = standalone top-level concept; 'part_of' = child concept owned by a parent via a part_of relation_to_one; 'recursive_part_of' = concept that is part_of itself (tree structure).

_profile_for_roles.description: Roles for which this concept acts as profile. Only present if the concept is a profile for at least one role. A profile concept stores the extended user data for users of those roles.

_be_presentation_mode.description: How the backend computes the presentation string for this concept. 'generated_column' = SQL GENERATED ALWAYS AS expression (only simple same-table fields); 'trigger' = PL/pgSQL trigger (complex fields involving joins); 'none' = no presentation string configured.

_be_presentation_expr.description: The SQL expression used to populate id_presentation when _be_presentation_mode is 'generated_column'. Empty string otherwise.

_fe_owned_children.description: Child concepts that declare a part_of relation_to_one pointing to this concept. Used by the frontend to render nested tab panels. Each item has: child_concept, child_fk_field, child_plural.

_meta_m2m_links.description: Many-to-many relationship descriptors where this concept is either source or target. Used by both backend (join table DDL) and frontend (ReferenceManyField). Each item has: target_concept, join_table, my_fk, other_fk, field_name, is_source.

_prefill_groups.description: Prefill group metadata for concepts that have prefill fields

_be_sql_type.description: PostgreSQL column type derived from the abstract field type. Examples: string/s→VARCHAR(255), string/m|l→TEXT, markdown→TEXT, integer→INTEGER, decimal→DECIMAL(p,s), boolean→BOOLEAN, date→DATE, datetime→TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE, enum→TEXT, relation_to_one→INTEGER, relation_to_many→'' (handled via join table).

_be_not_null.description: Whether the column should have a NOT NULL constraint. Mirrors the field's 'required' property.

_fe_component.description: Input component used in create/edit forms. Possible values include React-Admin components such as TextInput, NumberInput, BooleanInput and DateInput, plus generated components such as PrecisionDateTimeInput, RelatedValidationInput and MarkdownInput.

_fe_component_options.description: Resolved JSX props appended directly to _fe_component by frontend templates. Empty when the component needs no model-derived options.

_fe_list_component.description: React-Admin Field component used in list and show views. Possible values: TextField, NumberField, BooleanField, DateField, ReferenceField, ReferenceManyField, MarkdownField (generated markdown renderer for markdown fields).

_fe_list_component_options.description: Resolved JSX props appended directly to _fe_list_component by frontend templates. Empty when the component needs no model-derived options.

_fe_grid_width.description: MUI Grid column span for the field in forms. 6 for medium/large fields (size m or l), 3 for small fields (size s), 12 for markdown fields (full-row editor).

_fe_visibility.description: Controls how the field appears in the UI. 'editable' = shown in forms and lists, user can edit; 'read_only' = shown but not editable (e.g. calculated fields, id); 'internal' = hidden from UI entirely (e.g. state, part_of_order, _-prefixed system fields).

_prefill_group.description: Name of the prefill group this field belongs to

_prefill_source_field.description: Original field name in the source concept

_prefill_is_pres_field.description: True if this field is the presentation field of the prefill group

_validation_csv_filename.description: CSV filename for the validation this field participates in

_validation_csv_column.description: Zero-based column index in the CSV validation
